title: Luminous loot
description: Adds glowing effects to rare loot drops so you never miss valuable items!
body:
Enhance your Minecraft world with this lightweight effects pack that adds **beautiful glowing particle circles** around entities, blocks, spawners, or custom datapack mechanics. Designed for decoration, indicators, bosses, and magical themes, these circles create a clean and stylish visual layer without lag or complicated systems.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bSj8vt5od9M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## **Features:**
* **Perfect Particles:** Smoothly calculated points create a flawless circular outline every tick.
* **Glowing:** Smoothly add glowing effect to items.
* **Minimal & Lightweight:** Pure `execute` + `particle` commands.
* **Great for Datapack Builders:** Perfect for boss arenas, ability indicators, magic circles, range displays, and environmental effects.

## **Item Affected by Datapack/mod:**
![Item affected](https://i.postimg.cc/VsghfCZ4/image.png)

This pack is perfect for players and creators wanting **clean visuals**, **magic-style aesthetics**, or **professional datapack markers** without clutter or performance impact.

If you want **custom shapes, animations, rotating circles, symbols, runes, or more glow effects**, feel free to DM me on [Planet Minecraft ↗](http://bib.free.nf/planet-minecraft)
